narration: Science has a clearer story about transcription factors than social media does.

narration: Transcription factors are proteins that bind to specific DNA sequences, turning genes on or off.
visual_description: Context visual: Transcription factors are proteins that bind to specific DNA sequences, turning genes on or off.
ai_image_prompt: Context visual: Transcription factors are proteins that bind to specific DNA sequences, turning genes on or off.
ai_video_prompt: Cinematic motion: Context visual: Transcription factors are proteins that bind to specific DNA sequences, turning genes on or off.

narration: Imagine them as the conductors of an orchestra, controlling the symphony of life at a molecular level.
visual_description: Escalation visual: Imagine them as the conductors of an orchestra, controlling the symphony of life at a molecular level.
